---
title: "supplementary_file"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

## Figures

```{r}
#| echo: FALSE
#source("R_codes/Plotting/posterior_parameter_full_model.R")
```

![Posterior samples for the four regression coefficients with the largest absolute mean values](paper_draft/figures/parameter_posterior_histogram.png){#suppfig-posterior_parameters_full_model}

```{r}
#| echo: FALSE
#source("R_codes/Plotting/bivariate_and_marginal_posterior_plots.R")
```

![Posterior distribution for the projected pameters of the reduced model for carotenoid](paper_draft/figures/bivariate_plots_for_Carotenoid_Area.png){#fig-bivariate_posterior_parameter}

##
